question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Which country is the league Italy Serie A from? Italy Serie A from refers to League.name = 'Italy Serie A';
orig_masked: Which [C2] is the [T2] [V1] from? [V1] from refers to [T2].[C5] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]
orig_evidence: Italy Serie A from refers to League.name = 'Italy Serie A';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t2.name = 'Italy Serie A'

question: <QUESTION>

question: <QUESTION>

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the average heights of Italy players? average heights refers to Avg(height); Italy is name of country
orig_masked: What is the average [C122] of [V1] [T4]? average [C122] refers to Avg([C122]); [V1] is [C2] of [T1]; [V1] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_evidence: average heights refers to Avg(height); Italy is name of country
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.height) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.country_id = T3.ID WHERE T3.NAME = 'Italy'

question: <QUESTION>

orig_evidence: A2 refers to the names of districts.
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.date FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A2 = 'Prachatice'

question: <QUESTION>
